Title: Rent Increase Service
Body (HTML):
A simple, professional way to increase rent legally and compliantly — without disputes or delays.

We manage the entire rent increase process for you, ensuring it is fair, affordable, and defensible, particularly where a property may be sold with a tenant in place.

Our stages of service:

  • Affordability & Market Review
    We assess what rent increase is realistic based on market data, tenant affordability, and sale considerations.

  • Professional Rent Increase Assessment
    A formal, evidence-based assessment to support the proposed increase.

  • Tenant Communication
    Official email and recorded postal notice sent to the tenant, clearly explaining the increase and any intention to sell.

  • Legally Served Notice
    Rent increase issued in the correct legal format and with the required notice period for England or Scotland. 1 months notice for England and 3 months notice for Scotland typically.

Why Use This Service?

  • Protect tenant relationships

  • Maximise rental income during the sale process

  • Ensure your property fits eligibility to be sold to another investor for listing success.

  • Ideal preparation for selling a tenanted property

Process for RICS Level 2 Survey:

  • Visual inspection of all accessible areas (inside & outside)
  • Assessment of building condition with colour-coded ratings
  • Identification of defects, damp, subsidence, and structural concerns
  • Evaluation of fittings, services, and grounds (non-intrusive)
  • Advice on repair priorities and ongoing maintenance
  • Estimated market valuation and reinstatement cost

Selling your investment property with a Survey increases your chance of a sale being agreed by over 30% and almost doubles your completion rate as buyers have much more confidence in the purchase especially when making an investment decision.

The service is completely hands off and Let Property will schedule the survey and photography at the same time with 1 hours of access to cause as little disruption to your tenant as possible.

Title: Auction Tenanted Property Pre-Sale Legal Pack
Body (HTML):
Purchasing an Auction Legal Pack is an essential step for any seller looking to achieve a smooth, confident, and successful sale at auction. The pack is professionally prepared to compile all legal documents, searches, and disclosures required by buyers before bidding. Providing this information upfront not only protects you as the seller, but also maximises buyer interest and encourages strong bidding.

What the Auction Legal Pack Includes

  • Official Title Documents confirming ownership and any rights, covenants, or restrictions.

  • Searches such as Local Authority, Drainage & Water, and Environmental reports.

  • Special Conditions of Sale tailored to your property and your preferred terms.

  • Property Information Forms & Fixtures and Fittings List (where applicable).

  • Lease Documents for leasehold properties.

  • Planning and Building Regulation Certificates, if relevant.

  • Any additional documents your solicitor considers necessary.

Why Sellers Benefit from an Auction Legal Pack

  • Increases Buyer Confidence
    Providing a full set of legal documents upfront gives bidders the certainty they need to commit to strong, competitive bidding.

  • Faster, Smoother Sale
    Because buyers complete due diligence before the auction, there is far less risk of delays or complications after the hammer falls.

  • Reduces Fall-Through Risk
    Serious buyers review the pack in advance, so only committed bidders take part — dramatically lowering the chance of post-auction withdrawal.

  • Strengthens Your Final Sale Price
    Confident buyers bid higher. A clear, complete legal pack creates a competitive environment that often drives up the final sale price.

  • Ensures Full Legal Compliance
    You meet all auction requirements by providing the necessary documents upfront, protecting you from future disputes.

  • Saves You Time & Stress
    Early preparation of the pack means fewer last-minute issues and a smoother overall selling experience.

Title: Tenancy Agreement + Digital Signature
Body (HTML):
When you order we'll create a fully compliant tenancy agreement and send it out for a digital signature between you and your tenant.

Tenancy agreements are available for both Scottish and English tenants. Once you make the payment via Credit Card we will send the tenancy agreement via an online digital signature:

Step 1 - Once you have made the payment we will send you a form to ask for some basic details in order for us to create the tenancy agreement. 
Step 2 - The tenancy agreement will then be sent to your email for a digital signature by yourself as the landlord.
Step 3 - Only once you have signed and agreed to the tenancy agreement will it be sent for digital signature to your tenant.
Step 4 - You will receive a copy of the tenancy agreement and we will have it on our system to process your property listing too.

A valid tenancy agreement is required by law and is required in order to list your property for sale through the Let Property Investment Property Marketplace.

If you have multiple tenants on the one tenancy agreement then you only need to buy 1 tenancy agreement from us. If you have multiple tenants on separate agreements, then please purchase multiple agreements using the quantity selector on the checkout page.

Title: Upgraded Premium Listing Boost On Rightmove, Zoopla & OnTheMarket
Body (HTML):
Unlock the highest-impact marketing upgrade available.

Upgraded Premium Listings Boost places your property in a more prominent position on Rightmove, Zoopla and OnTheMarket — delivering:

  • A “Premium Listing” is an enhanced advert upgrade (vs. the standard listing) that makes your property more prominent in search results.

  • Up to 10x more exposure.

  • Increased enquiry volume.

  • Stronger perceived value and urgency from prospective investors.

Perfect for sellers who want faster traction and maximum market reach.

This listing Boost applies for all of the following platforms:

  • Rightmove.co.uk (lasts 6 months)
  • Zoopla.co.uk (lasts 12 months)
  • OnTheMarket.co.uk (lasts 12 months)

We list your property for free through all of these portals but this is an additional 3rd party service that you can add on in order to achieve a faster sale as your listing is better placed with relevant search terms.

Title: Property Title
Body (HTML): We will request your property title from HMRC and verify it against your ID. This is required in order to list a property in the UK and prove that you are the owner of the property.
